content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR NIVR GIET UNIVERSITY OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS GUNUPUR -765022, DIST-RAYAGADA, INDIA Ref.No. GIETU/Exam/2025/ Is13 Memo No: I574C25) Copy to: - It is for information of all the scholars / students admitted during the session 2025-26 that, those who have not submitted their Transfer certificate / College Leaving Certificate, Conduct Certificate and Migration Certificate so far should submit the same on or before 30.11.2025. After that a late fee of Rs.500/ (Rupees five hundred only) will be imposed for late submission of the above documents. NOTICE Academic Registry for Information. Date: -03/1 1/2025 GIETU Website / Notice Board Controller of Examinations GIET University Vice - Chancellor/Registrar/ Deputy Registrar / Dean (Academics) / Dean SOET / Date: 03/11/2 02 5 Dean SOAG/Dean SMS/All Hod's/All coordinators for information and necessary action. They are requested to circulate the notice among the students admitted in their branch in the vear 2025- 26. Contioller of Examinations GIET University
